          "2:LEN": "[build-system]\nrequires = [\"setuptools>=69\", \"wheel\"]\nbuild-backend = \"setuptools.build_meta\"\n\n[project]\nname = \"miniq\"\nversion = \"0.1.0\"\ndescription = \"Local production-style job queue and scheduler using FastAPI, Redis Streams, and SQLite.\"\nreadme = \"README.md\"\nrequires-python = \">=3.12\"\ndependencies = [\n  \"aiosqlite>=0.20.0,<1.0.0\",\n  \"croniter>=6.0.0,<7.0.0\",\n  \"fastapi>=0.116.0,<1.0.0\",\n  \"httpx>=0.28.0,<1.0.0\",\n  \"orjson>=3.10.0,<4.0.0\",\n  \"prometheus-client>=0.23.0,<1.0.0\",\n  \"pydantic>=2.11.0,<3.0.0\",\n  \"pydantic-settings>=2.10.0,<3.0.0\",\n  \"python-dateutil>=2.9.0,<3.0.0\",\n  \"pyyaml>=6.0.2,<7.0.0\",\n  \"redis[hiredis]>=6.4.0,<7.0.0\",\n  \"sqlalchemy>=2.0.43,<3.0.0\",\n  \"typer>=0.16.0,<1.0.0\",\n  \"uvicorn[standard]>=0.35.0,<1.0.0\",\n]\n\n[project.optional-dependencies]\ndev = [\n  \"fakeredis>=2.31.0,<3.0.0\",\n  \"mypy>=1.19.0,<2.0.0\",\n  \"pytest>=9.0.0,<10.0.0\",\n  \"pytest-asyncio>=1.2.0,<2.0.0\",\n  \"ruff>=0.15.0,<1.0.0\",\n]\n\n[project.scripts]\nminiq = \"miniq.cli:app\"\nminiq-api = \"miniq.api.app:main\"\nminiq-worker = \"miniq.worker.service:main\"\nminiq-scheduler = \"miniq.scheduler.service:main\"\n\n[tool.setuptools]\npackage-dir = {\"\" = \"src\"}\n\n[tool.setuptools.packages.find]\nwhere = [\"src\"]\n\n[tool.pytest.ini_options]\nasyncio_mode = \"auto\"\ntestpaths = [\"tests\"]\n\n[tool.ruff]\nline-length = 100\ntarget-version = \"py312\"\n\n[tool.ruff.lint]\nselect = [\n  \"B\",\n  \"E\",\n  \"F\",\n  \"I\",\n  \"N\",\n  \"S\",\n  \"UP\",\n]\nignore = [\n  \"S104\",\n]\n\n[tool.ruff.format]\nquote-style = \"double\"\n\n[tool.mypy]\npython_version = \"3.12\"\nstrict = true\nmypy_path = [\"src\"]\npackages = [\"miniq\"]\nplugins = []\nwarn_unused_ignores = true\nwarn_redundant_casts = true\nwarn_return_any = true\nwarn_unreachable = true\ndisallow_any_generics = true\nshow_error_codes = true\n\n"
        },
